title: Claude Fable 5 Just Changed Website Design Forever
summary: Jack Roberts demonstrates Claude Fable 5 capabilities for website design, comparing it against Opus 4.8 across three progressive challenge levels. The video examines token efficiency, design quality details, and strategic deployment choices between model versions.
writeup: Jack Roberts tests Claude Fable 5 on website design, running it against Opus 4.8 through three progressively harder challenges. The comparison focuses on token efficiency, design quality details, and when to choose one model version over the other. Takeaways center on how the two models differ in output quality and resource use, and on the strategic tradeoffs in deploying each for design tasks.
